message:
test(resize): expand resize_memory_controls from 15 to 34 inline tests + 14 integration tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add comprehensive edge-case coverage for ResizeMemoryPolicy:
- Custom config overrides (batch sizes, overscan caps, scratch buffer, compaction)
- Boundary conditions: zero remaining/scrollback, exact limits, usize::MAX
- Serde roundtrip validation for config/budget/metrics
- Saturating arithmetic at u64::MAX
- Multi-tier pressure transitions and oscillation
- Disabled policy tier storage behavior

Also fixes workspace-wide cargo fmt drift in vendored crates and
applies clippy PartialEq+Eq fix on ResizeMemoryConfig.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"wa-1u90p.4.7","title":"Implement adaptive rendering quality policy by hardware tier and live pressure signals","description":"## Context
A single fixed policy cannot maximize UX across low-end and high-end hardware.

## Scope
Introduce adaptive quality controls driven by capability detection and live pressure metrics (frame misses, queue depth, memory pressure).

## Deliverables
- Hardware-tier policy profiles with safe defaults
- Runtime adaptation state machine with hysteresis
- Telemetry proving stable policy transitions

## Why this matters
Improves real-world user experience consistency across heterogeneous machines.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Policy transitions avoid oscillation and preserve visual correctness.
- Low-end profiles reduce hitching without semantic regressions.
- High-end profiles retain maximum quality while meeting frame budgets.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":240,"created_at":"2026-02-13T00:52:29.963317Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-13T01:22:40.755708Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["adaptive","gpu","reflow","render","resize","track-render"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.7","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:52:38.975447Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.7","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:52:29.963317Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.7","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.4.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:52:38.876022Z","created_by":"jemanuel"}]}
